verdict_summary: HAR sanitized into 3 token-free JSON files (206KB total) — 2 ChatHub WebSocket entries with 108 frames preserved, all sensitive headers and JWT/bearer tokens redacted, GitHub-secret-scanner-safe.
notes: Two WebSocket sessions found: (1) wss://go.trouter.teams.microsoft.com/v4/c (Trouter signaling, 14 frames, socket.io-style protocol — first send frame contains user.authenticate handshake with Authorization Bearer redacted); (2) wss://substrate.office.com/m365Copilot/Chathub/<sessionId>@<tenantId> (94 frames, 89 receive / 5 send — the actual M365 Copilot ChatHub envelope stream). Status 101 WebSocket Upgrade on both. Fallback grep for 'Something went wrong' found 10 matches (likely error envelope text inside ChatHub frames or HTTP response bodies). One conversationTransferToken (base64 JSON, NOT a credential — only contains conversationId UUID) was conservatively redacted to first-8-chars + [REDACTED_BLOB] to avoid GitHub secret-scanner false positives. Token scan PASSED: zero matches for 'Bearer eyJ', 'eyJ.x.y.z' JWT pattern, raw 'Authorization:' header values, or Cookie content. 449 unique HTTP endpoints listed for FIX-F reference.
